overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a sunlit Mediterranean-style city during golden hour. The character moves from covered stone corridors through cobblestone streets with NPCs, then along an elevated overlook with balustrades overlooking a lake and mountains, finally descending a path through a stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered palace walkway transitioning to courtyard

events.description: exiting shaded covered walkway into sunlit courtyard area
moving from enclosed corridor into open courtyard with trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered stone corridor with swords on back, approaching sunlit courtyard

entered.detail: roofed stone corridor with ornate columns and railings
tall cylindrical stone pillars supporting the corridor roof
grand building with green copper dome visible in the distance
large stone pots flanking the courtyard entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a shaded covered stone walkway with columns and railings. The character walks forward as the lighting transitions from shadow to bright sunlight when entering an open courtyard area with potted plants and trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with Mediterranean architecture

events.description: entering populated street from quiet courtyard
slight navigation around pedestrians walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking through sunlit cobblestone streets, navigating past pedestrians and observing the architecture

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking past the camera
man in brown tunic walking along the street

entered.detail: irregular stone paving typical of historic European streets
stone buildings with red tiled roofs and arched windows
tall red painted columns on building facades
planters with red flowers on building ledges

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a sunlit cobblestone street lined with Mediterranean-style buildings featuring red columns and flower boxes. Several NPCs walk along the street, including a woman in a green dress passing by on the left. The palace building remains visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with balustrades overlooking lake and mountains

events.description: exiting enclosed street into open plaza with panoramic overlook
entering area with strong golden hour light casting long shadows

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated plaza with stone balustrades, enjoying the view of the lake and mountains

notable_agents.action: person leaning against the stone balustrade looking at the view

entered.detail: ornate stone railings lining the elevated overlook
large body of water visible in the valley below
blue mountains rising in the background across the lake
reddish stone tiles in the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide elevated plaza with stone balustrades offering a panoramic view of a distant lake and mountain range. The golden hour light creates long shadows across the red brick paving. An NPC leans against the railing enjoying the view as the character walks along the overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending cobblestone path toward waterfront through stone archway

events.description: beginning descent down sloped cobblestone path toward the water
passing through large stone archway framing the waterfront view

agents.ego_description: descending the sloped cobblestone path toward the waterfront, passing through a stone archway with views of the distant town across the lake

entered.detail: large stone arch framing the path and distant view
tall slender evergreen trees lining the descending path
cluster of buildings visible across the lake at water level
abandoned cart with wooden wheels beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path descends steeply through dense vegetation with cypress trees lining the route. A large stone archway frames the view of the waterfront town across the lake. The character walks through the archway as the perspective shifts to show the distant shoreline and mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded corridors of a Mediterranean city into a wide, sun-drenched overlook and down toward a distant waterfront. It begins in a covered stone walkway with columns, moving forward as the lighting shifts from deep shadow to bright sunlight upon entering an open courtyard filled with potted plants. The camera then emerges into a bustling cobblestone street lined with red columns and flower boxes, passing NPCs and a woman in a green dress while a palace remains visible in the distance. As the path opens into an elevated plaza, the scene expands to reveal a panoramic view of a lake and mountain range under the long shadows of the golden hour. Finally, the perspective descends through a corridor of cypress trees and passes through a large stone archway that frames the distant shoreline and mountains.
